Generated by FlashAttention-5 Phase 1 Analysis

Policy: INT8 default, FP16 for outlier blocks with peaked attention (entropy < 2.0)

Evolved via OpenEvolve over 80 iterations

Real LLM Validation — Qwen2-0.5B

Model: Qwen/Qwen2-0.5B  |  FP16-flagged heads: 89.7%  |  INT8-safe heads: 10.3%  |  Total (layer×head×prompt): 1680
